codeReview.summary: The commit satisfies the feature intent: the accidental Supabase CLI notice text is removed from the end of src/types/database.ts, and ignoreRestSiblings is added to @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars in eslint.config.mjs. No blocking correctness or security regressions were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill is optimized for visual/UI work and does not explicitly define a streamlined path for non-visual lint/config fixes, even though this feature required only config/generated-file edits.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file (.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md) emphasizes visual verification (agent-browser, viewport checks). Transcript for worker session 00e231d8-d5fe-41bd-b6fb-dd13e50a3f35 shows no browser verification and handoff.skillFeedback suggests adding a skip condition for pure config/lint fixes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Lint is a recurring verification command in this mission but is not listed in .factory/services.yaml command aliases.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature verification required pnpm lint; worker transcript and handoff show pnpm lint was executed. .factory/services.yaml defines install/build/dev/typecheck, but no lint command entry.

summary: Reviewed commit 05f3994 for feature fix-preexisting-lint-errors and found it meets expected behavior with no blocking issues. Added two shared-state observations (skill scope clarity and missing lint command alias in services metadata).
